_comment: Drop this into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or %APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Windows). For Claude Code, prefer <host-project>/.mcp.json — the MCP cwd matches your project root and grpc-client will auto-discover ./.grpc-client/config.json. Use GRPC_CLIENT_CONFIG only when the config lives elsewhere.
